notion_crm.status: In Negotiation. Contract under review by MoFo. Intro call 2026-03-27. Meeting held 2026-06-29.
notion_crm.notes: Regional DSD, refrigerated focus, NYC. Distribution frontrunner. Intro via Perry Blatt. Contract concerns: no cold chain requirement, Guaranteed Sale clause, 17% fee, 80% termination fee, Invasion Fee. MoFo view: of Rainforest / Dora's / Big Geyser, 'Rainforest has the least aggressive contract and fewest client complaints.' Accounts serviced (linked): Olive & Oak, Gourmet Garage, Fairway. Second contact: Amaury Schoon, VP of Sales (named in 7/22 NNY event listing). Retail Accounts CRM row for Rainforest is marked 'ARCHIVED - Moved to Distributors DB'.

notion_crm.status: Contacts DB says 'Dormant / Passed' from the 2/11 eval call, BUT this is STALE — the CRM Distributor field now shows Meraki as converting/candidate across Fairway, Butterfield, Gourmet Garage, and many targets, and calls were held 5/7, 7/7 and 7/10.
notion_crm.notes: 5/7 call: ~350 accounts, tri-state, A-list and select B-tier stores. 25% margin (not markup), flexible for account access (e.g. 20% for Fairway). No contract, no exclusivity, no onboarding fees. Coexists with UNFI. Net 30. Services Hamptons and Long Island/NJ. Key pricing math: at $11.99 SRP, Meraki needs to buy in at $5.36; current direct wholesale is $7.14 — 'pricing structure not yet built for distribution.' Freight adds ~10%. NOT viable for Fairway (Wakefern won't accept Meraki). Original 2/11 eval: 'not a fit for current stage — they don't service chains, don't do formal buying meetings, HPP/dairy hasn't been done well.'

notion_crm.status: In Negotiation. Met at Expo West; follow-up call 2026-04-08.
notion_crm.notes: A la carte logistics provider: cold storage in Edison NJ (~$75/pallet, charged on end-of-month inventory), delivery routes (cost-plus 5-10% markup), micro-distributor model, no exclusivity or hidden fees. Planning Manhattan micro-warehouse. Setting up Fairway and Gourmet Garage accounts through Sour Milk (6-8 week turnaround). Expanding to LA and Miami. Retail Accounts CRM row marked 'ARCHIVED - Moved to Distributors DB'.

calendar.person: Kelly Paton; Ari Jordan; Yukina Shambare
calendar.role: Kelly Paton = Sr Buyer Deli; Ari Jordan = inventory analyst; Yukina Shambare = associate buyer
calendar.status: HAPPENED — 'Cotto | Target Connect', 2026-05-07 16:30 ET (Zoom, hosted by Kelly Paton). Target team tried all 3 flavors; Buffalo was the team favorite, French Onion also well received.
calendar.doors_or_stores: Super Target = 220 stores, serviced by 6 of 9 FDCs
calendar.review_window: Line review for the April 2027 transition runs June through mid-July 2026 — that window is closing NOW. 2027 launch windows: Jan/Feb or April.
calendar.notes: Pricing path: $10.99 current → $9.99 near-term → $8.99 ultimate (aligns with Buffy); contingent on new co-man. Target recommended starting vendor onboarding now (Bezi pattern: conversations summer 2026 → launch summer 2027). Rachel to send email introducing Merch Specialist team. Broker recs: Moscow Group or KMG. Preferred dip distributors: KeHE, GFI, Got Foods. Target wants exclusive flavors to drive traffic. Promo structure: vendor-initiated (Cotto pays 100%) vs Target-initiated. Prep block on calendar at 16:00.

calendar.status: HAPPENED — 'Opportunity Knocks by Startup CPG - Fireside Chat with Earth Fare', 2026-05-06 16:00 ET. Public buyer Q&A webinar, not a 1:1.
calendar.review_window: Opportunity Knocks applications closed May 14. A later calendar item flags 'Prep: Earth Fare Dips Review Closes ~Jun 26'.
calendar.notes: Earth Fare's primary distributor is UNFI; secondary for Center Store are Rainforest and GFI — both already in Cotto's pipeline. 'Brands do NOT need distribution set up before submitting.' Refrigerated dips were NOT mentioned as oversaturated. Organic certification NOT a dealbreaker. Submission tips: check the boot list first; 'Don't pitch on LinkedIn.' Calendar 5/11 also has '🔴 Apply for Oppty Knocks Earth Fare (due 5/14)'.

calendar.person: Amanda Zuroick (Fischer); Agustina Lago Evia; Kayshwar Mohan
calendar.status: HAPPENED — 'Fairway Connect', 2026-05-19 15:00 ET (Teams). Launch planning across all 4 NYC locations.
calendar.notes: Launch week June 5-11; ad runs June 5-11; in-store sampling demos June 11-14, one store per day. Instacart is 30% of Fairway sales — critical for launch; file pulled every Sunday, needed before the May 25 pull. Retail price $10.99. Email to 90K Fairway insiders. First time Cotto available on UWS and in Kips Bay/Chelsea — angle: 'Finally available nearby.' Business context: Lidl opened in Kips Bay taking business; Trader Joe's recently closed on UWS and Fairway wants to capitalize.
